name: are-coach-functions
comment-overrides: Patch-level overrides for transitive web-facing CVEs in the express request-parsing chain pulled in by firebase-functions. Same-major patches, safe. The 3 high-severity advisories (@grpc/grpc-js, form-data, protobufjs) were cleared by `npm audit fix` — no major bumps. The 9 remaining moderates are all one internal GCP-SDK chain (uuid -> gaxios/teeny-request/retry-request -> google-gax -> @google-cloud/* -> firebase-admin); npm's only 'fix' for them is downgrading firebase-admin to 10.3.0, which is an OLDER and therefore worse-patched major. Left until Google bumps them upstream. Re-check with `npm audit` before each release.
